title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 633.029 - Definition to determine status of eligibility
text:
633.029.  Definition to determine status of eligibility. — All persons determined eligible for services provided by the division of developmental disabilities prior to January 1, 1991, shall be eligible for services on the basis of their earlier determination of eligibility without regard to their eligibility status under the definition of developmental disability contained in section 630.005.
(L. 1990 H.B. 1383, A.L. 2011 H.B. 555 merged with H.B. 648)
